cognitive_layer.purpose: Performs structure-based molecular docking validation on candidate target proteins identified from single-cell ligand-receptor analysis. Accepts pre-processed target protein list and a compound library, then uses AutoDock Vina to rank binding affinities and generate poses.

parameter_impact.target_proteins: List of UniProt IDs or gene symbols for proteins to dock against.
parameter_impact.compound_library: 'fda_approved' uses the built-in FDA drug library; 'custom_cas' requires custom_cas_list.
parameter_impact.docking_exhaustiveness: Higher values increase search accuracy but scale quadratically in runtime. Default 8 is sufficient for screening.
parameter_impact.drug_info_csv: Optional path to BindingDB-style annotation CSV.
